title: Animation Prototype Example
subtitle: Tune motion values with inline slider controls.

sections.heading: Animation Prototype in use
sections.body: This prototype makes motion values visible. The sliders update locally, and the diagram shows how duration and easing affect staged UI movement.

cards.title: Duration
cards.body: Tune between instant press feedback and slower page-level reveals.

cards.title: Distance
cards.body: Preview how far the element should travel before it feels disconnected.

cards.title: Reduced motion
cards.body: The embedded CSS includes a reduced-motion override for animations and transitions.

sections.heading: Motion controls
sections.body: Move the sliders to confirm keyboard and pointer controls render in the offline artifact.
